sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96854" key="stifro/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στιφρότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n96854.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">solidity, stoutness</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0515.tlg001:22:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Timocl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
